docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,635.00 FILED BY GABRIEL, BERT AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOURT, ANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
